import urllib.request

    response = urllib.request.urlopen\('http://elasticsearch:9200', timeout=5\)

Bash(cd "D:\\dissertation\\shop" && docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "python -c \\"
from django.conf import settings
print\('ELASTICSEARCH_DSL:', settings.ELASTICSEARCH_DSL\)
from elasticsearch_dsl import connections
connections.configure\(**settings.ELASTICSEARCH_DSL\)
conn = connections.get_connection\(\)
print\('Connection:', conn\)
try:
    info = conn.info\(\)
    print\('Cluster info:', info['cluster_name']\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
\\"")
